_comment: Recognized swear-jar release-provenance hashes. Each key under `releases` is the 40-char lowercase git commit SHA of a PUBLISHED release; the value records that release's version. Real hashes are appended here by the release-stamp step at tag time (see src/version.mjs, which stamps RELEASE_HASH into the shipped build). The all-zeros placeholder below is the dev-build sentinel: it documents the format + version, but isKnownRelease() treats it as UNVERIFIED on purpose, so dev builds never earn a verified badge.
